creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
I contacted upstream regarding a Python 3 release of their code:

  https://github.com/viewvc/viewvc/issues/236

In short, they said use what's on master.

From that, devel/viewvc-devel was created using Python 3 - I'm running that at home.

The work was based on:

* https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=247161
* https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=247804
